words.meaning_en: A stick of wax with a wick that gives light when burned
words.example_sentence: She lit a candle during the power cut.

words.meaning_en: A piece of land where flowers, vegetables, or trees are grown
words.example_sentence: Grandma waters her garden every evening.

words.meaning_en: A container used to boil water
words.example_sentence: Put the kettle on to make some tea.

words.meaning_en: A set of steps used to climb up or down
words.example_sentence: The painter climbed the ladder to reach the ceiling.

words.meaning_en: A device that makes a loud sound to warn or wake someone
words.example_sentence: He set the alarm for 6 in the morning.

words.meaning_en: A piece of furniture with a back for one person to sit on
words.example_sentence: She pulled the chair and sat down.

words.meaning_en: A piece of furniture with a flat top on legs
words.example_sentence: Books were spread across the table.

words.meaning_en: A piece of furniture used for sleeping
words.example_sentence: He went to bed early last night.

words.meaning_en: A panel that opens and closes to let people in or out
words.example_sentence: Please knock before opening the door.

words.meaning_en: An opening in a wall covered with glass to let in light
words.example_sentence: She opened the window to let in fresh air.

words.meaning_en: A device for showing the time
words.example_sentence: The clock on the wall showed three o'clock.

words.meaning_en: A glass surface that reflects images
words.example_sentence: She looked at herself in the mirror.

words.meaning_en: A brush with a long handle used for sweeping floors
words.example_sentence: She swept the floor with a broom.

words.meaning_en: A round container with a handle used to hold water
words.example_sentence: He filled the bucket with water.

words.meaning_en: Energy in the form of electric current used to power things
words.example_sentence: The fan stopped because there was no electricity.

words.meaning_en: A device used to turn electricity on or off
words.example_sentence: Please turn off the switch before sleeping.

words.meaning_en: A container for rubbish or waste
words.example_sentence: Throw the wrapper in the dustbin, not on the road.

words.meaning_en: A device that blows cool air to reduce heat indoors
words.example_sentence: We switched on the cooler in summer.

words.meaning_en: An electrical device with rotating blades used to cool a room
words.example_sentence: Please switch on the fan, it is very hot.

words.meaning_en: A large container for storing water
words.example_sentence: The water tank on the roof was full.

words.meaning_en: A platform on the outside of a building with a railing
words.example_sentence: She watered her plants on the balcony.

words.meaning_en: A piece of cloth hung over a window to block light
words.example_sentence: He pulled the curtain to block the sunlight.

words.meaning_en: A pipe or structure that lets smoke out of a building
words.example_sentence: Smoke rose from the chimney of the factory.

words.meaning_en: A flat open area on the roof of a building
words.example_sentence: We flew kites from the terrace on Independence Day.

words.meaning_en: A flat board fixed to a wall or inside a cupboard to hold things
words.example_sentence: She arranged her books on the shelf.

words.meaning_en: A soft cushion used to rest the head while sleeping
words.example_sentence: He placed his head on the pillow and fell asleep.

words.meaning_en: A set of steps inside a building connecting floors
words.example_sentence: She ran up the staircase to reach her class.

words.meaning_en: A thick soft pad placed on a bed to sleep on
words.example_sentence: He spread the mattress on the floor.

words.meaning_en: The room where food is cooked
words.example_sentence: Mum is in the kitchen making dinner.

words.meaning_en: A room used for sleeping
words.example_sentence: He tidied his bedroom before bed.

words.meaning_en: A long comfortable seat for more than one person
words.example_sentence: The family sat on the sofa to watch TV.

words.meaning_en: A room with a bath, shower, and toilet
words.example_sentence: She brushed her teeth in the bathroom.

words.meaning_en: A tool with a long handle used to clean floors
words.example_sentence: He used a mop to clean the wet floor.
